2604.23626.title: GraphPlanner: Graph Memory-Augmented Agentic Routing for Multi-Agent LLMs
2604.23626.paper_summary: LLM routing has achieved promising results in integrating the strengths of diverse models while balancing efficiency and performance. However, to support more realistic and challenging applications, routing must extend into agentic LLM settings, where task planning, multi-round cooperation among heterogeneous agents, and memory utilization are indispensable. To address this gap, we propose GraphPlanner, a heterogeneous graph memory-augmented agentic router for multi-agent LLMs that generates routing workflows for each query and supports both inductive and transductive inference. GraphPlanner formulates workflow generation as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), where at each step it selects both the LLM backbone and the agent role, including Planner, Executor, and Summarizer. By leveraging a heterogeneous graph, denoted as GARNet, to capture interaction memories among queries, agents, and responses, GraphPlanner integrates historical memory and workflow memory into richer state representations. The entire pipeline is optimized with reinforcement learning, jointly improving task-specific performance and computational efficiency. We evaluate GraphPlanner across 14 diverse LLM tasks and demonstrate that: (1) GraphPlanner outperforms strong single-round and multi-round routers, improving accuracy by up to 9.3% while reducing GPU cost from 186.26 GiB to 1.04 GiB; (2) GraphPlanner generalizes robustly to unseen tasks and LLMs, exhibiting strong zero-shot capabilities; and (3) GraphPlanner effectively leverages historical memories, supporting both inductive and transductive inference for more adaptive routing. Our code for GraphPlanner is released at https://github.com/ulab-uiuc/GraphPlanner.
2604.23626.paper_summary_zh: LLM 路由在整合不同模型的優勢，同時平衡效率和性能方面取得了可喜的成果。<lb/>然而，為了支持更現實和具有挑戰性的應用，路由必須擴展到代理 LLM 設置，其中任務規劃、異質代理之間的多輪合作和記憶利用是不可或缺的。<lb/>為了解決這一空白，我們提出了 GraphPlanner，一種增強異質圖記憶的代理路由器，專為多代理 LLM 設計，能為每個查詢生成路由工作流程，並支持歸納和傳導推理。<lb/>GraphPlanner 將工作流程生成公式化為馬可夫決策過程 (MDP)，在每一步中選擇 LLM 主幹和代理角色，包括規劃者、執行者和摘要者。<lb/>通過利用異質圖，稱為 GARNet，以捕捉查詢、代理和回應之間的互動記憶，GraphPlanner 將歷史記憶和工作流程記憶整合為更豐富的狀態表示。<lb/>整個流程通過強化學習進行優化，聯合改善任務特定性能和計算效率。<lb/>我們在 14 個不同的 LLM 任務中評估了 GraphPlanner，並證明： (1) GraphPlanner 超越了強大的單輪和多輪路由器，準確率提高了最多 9.3%，同時將 GPU 成本從 186.26 GiB 降低到 1.04 GiB； (2) GraphPlanner 對未見任務和 LLM 具有強大的泛化能力，展現出強大的零樣本能力； (3) GraphPlanner 有效利用歷史記憶，支持歸納和傳導推理，以實現更具適應性的路由。我們的 GraphPlanner 代碼已在 https://github.com/ulab-uiuc/GraphPlanner 發布。
2604.23626.author: Tao Feng et.al.
2604.23626.authors: Tao Feng, Haozhen Zhang, Zijie Lei, Peixuan Han, Jiaxuan You
